# Basic diff proxy server test with aggressive timeouts

# Set aggressive timeouts for rapid testing
env MCP_TEST_TIMEOUT=2s
env MCP_SERVER_TIMEOUT=1500ms
env MCP_TOOL_TIMEOUT=1s

# Start the server with aggressive timeout
exec timeout 8s go run . &
wait 200ms

# Test text_diff with simple strings
cat > text_diff_request.json << EOF
{
  "jsonrpc": "2.0",
  "id": 1,
  "method": "tools/call",
  "params": {
    "name": "text_diff",
    "arguments": {
      "text1": "Hello world\nLine 2",
      "text2": "Hello world\nLine 2 modified"
    }
  }
}
EOF

bash 'timeout 2s echo "$(<text_diff_request.json)" | mcpcat -'
stdout 'Line 2'
stdout 'modified|diff'

# Test text_diff with identical texts
cat > identical_text.json << EOF
{
  "jsonrpc": "2.0",
  "id": 2,
  "method": "tools/call",
  "params": {
    "name": "text_diff",
    "arguments": {
      "text1": "Same text",
      "text2": "Same text"
    }
  }
}
EOF

bash 'timeout 2s echo "$(<identical_text.json)" | mcpcat -'
stdout 'identical|Texts are identical'

# Create test files for file_diff
cat > file1.txt << EOF
First file content
Line 2
Line 3
EOF

cat > file2.txt << EOF
First file content
Line 2 modified
Line 3
Line 4 added
EOF

# Test file_diff
cat > file_diff_request.json << EOF
{
  "jsonrpc": "2.0",
  "id": 3,
  "method": "tools/call",
  "params": {
    "name": "file_diff",
    "arguments": {
      "file1": "file1.txt",
      "file2": "file2.txt"
    }
  }
}
EOF

bash 'timeout 2s echo "$(<file_diff_request.json)" | mcpcat -'
stdout 'modified|added|diff'

# Test file_diff with identical files
cp file1.txt file1_copy.txt

cat > identical_files.json << EOF
{
  "jsonrpc": "2.0",
  "id": 4,
  "method": "tools/call",
  "params": {
    "name": "file_diff",
    "arguments": {
      "file1": "file1.txt",
      "file2": "file1_copy.txt"
    }
  }
}
EOF

bash 'timeout 2s echo "$(<identical_files.json)" | mcpcat -'
stdout 'identical|Files are identical'

# Cleanup
exec rm -f text_diff_request.json identical_text.json file_diff_request.json identical_files.json file1.txt file2.txt file1_copy.txt
